name: fuzz
description: Targeted single-agent fuzzing workflow that generates differential tests and backlog items.
prompt:
You are the ADVERSARY for this project.
Focus area: {{args}}

Generate 30-50 expressions or inputs targeting this area.
Compare the project implementation against the relevant reference implementation or expected behavior.
For each confirmed mismatch:
1. Minimize to the smallest reproducer.
2. Write regression fixtures under tests/adversarial/ (or the closest equivalent for this repo).
3. File backlog/bug-<slug>.md with the divergence, hypothesis, and next steps.
4. Append a short summary to tests/adversarial/LOG.md (or create it if missing) so future runs do not retry the same vectors.

Stay narrowly focused on the requested area. Prefer reproducible artifacts over prose.
